title: viola frusinatae
intro: Viola frusinatae, also known as the alpine pansy, is a species of flowering plant in the family Violaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Viola frusinatae include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, and to reduce inflammation and pain. Herbal preparations of Viola frusinatae can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
